message:
✨ Add horizontally resizable cards with width controls

- Add resize submenu to card menu with width options (Small/Medium/Large/Wide/Full)
- Cards can now span 3, 4, 6, 8, or 12 grid columns
- Width changes persist to backend API
- Current width is highlighted in resize menu
- Submenu closes properly when parent menu closes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
